old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.43","title":"Harden recovered RenodeServer lifecycle","description":"Recover post-checkpoint listener-first shutdown, connection/task ownership, stale-callback isolation, RX cleanup, reconnect safety, and duplicate-push prevention.","acceptance_criteria":"Stop is idempotent; active clients receive EOF; no tasks remain; overlapping clients cannot replace owner; stale callbacks cannot reach reconnects; focused async tests and three reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T19:09:52.971123Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T19:09:52.971123Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.43","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T19:09:53.089369Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.43","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.59","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-17T19:10:55.439754Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
